concepts.label: Glycine
concepts.definition: Simplest amino acid, nonpolar, used in collagen synthesis

concepts.label: Alanine
concepts.definition: Nonpolar amino acid involved in glucose-alanine cycle

concepts.label: Valine
concepts.definition: Branched-chain essential amino acid, used in muscle metabolism

concepts.label: Leucine
concepts.definition: Essential BCAA, activates mTOR for protein synthesis

concepts.label: Isoleucine
concepts.definition: Essential BCAA, involved in hemoglobin synthesis and energy regulation

concepts.label: Proline
concepts.definition: Cyclic amino acid, key component of collagen

concepts.label: Phenylalanine
concepts.definition: Essential aromatic amino acid, precursor to tyrosine

concepts.label: Tryptophan
concepts.definition: Essential amino acid, precursor to serotonin and melatonin

concepts.label: Methionine
concepts.definition: Essential sulfur-containing amino acid, initiator of protein synthesis

concepts.label: Serine
concepts.definition: Polar amino acid involved in phospholipid synthesis

concepts.label: Threonine
concepts.definition: Essential amino acid important for mucin and collagen

concepts.label: Cysteine
concepts.definition: Sulfur-containing amino acid forming disulfide bonds

concepts.label: Tyrosine
concepts.definition: Aromatic amino acid, precursor to dopamine and thyroid hormones

concepts.label: Asparagine
concepts.definition: Polar amino acid involved in asparagine-linked glycosylation

concepts.label: Glutamine
concepts.definition: Most abundant free amino acid, fuel for enterocytes and immune cells

concepts.label: Aspartate
concepts.definition: Acidic amino acid, excitatory neurotransmitter, urea cycle participant

concepts.label: Glutamate
concepts.definition: Major excitatory neurotransmitter, involved in nitrogen metabolism

concepts.label: Lysine
concepts.definition: Essential basic amino acid, important for collagen cross-linking

concepts.label: Arginine
concepts.definition: Semi-essential amino acid, precursor to nitric oxide, urea cycle

concepts.label: Histidine
concepts.definition: Essential amino acid, precursor to histamine, contains imidazole ring

concepts.label: Amino Acid
concepts.definition: Organic molecule with amino and carboxyl group, building block of proteins

concepts.label: Essential Amino Acid
concepts.definition: Amino acid that cannot be synthesized by the body and must be obtained from diet

concepts.label: Branched-Chain Amino Acid
concepts.definition: Valine, leucine, isoleucine - BCAAs metabolized in muscle tissue

concepts.label: Protein Synthesis
concepts.definition: Process of translating mRNA into polypeptide chains on ribosomes

concepts.label: Vitamin A
concepts.definition: Fat-soluble vitamin (retinol) essential for vision, immune function, and skin health

concepts.label: Vitamin B1
concepts.definition: Thiamine - water-soluble vitamin essential for carbohydrate metabolism and nerve function

concepts.label: Vitamin B2
concepts.definition: Riboflavin - water-soluble vitamin, component of FAD and FMN coenzymes

concepts.label: Vitamin B3
concepts.definition: Niacin - water-soluble vitamin, precursor to NAD+ and NADP+

concepts.label: Vitamin B5
concepts.definition: Pantothenic acid - component of coenzyme A, essential for fatty acid metabolism

concepts.label: Vitamin B6
concepts.definition: Pyridoxine - coenzyme in amino acid metabolism and neurotransmitter synthesis

concepts.label: Vitamin B7
concepts.definition: Biotin - coenzyme for carboxylase enzymes in gluconeogenesis and fatty acid synthesis

concepts.label: Vitamin B9
concepts.definition: Folate - essential for DNA synthesis, methylation, and neural tube development

concepts.label: Vitamin B12
concepts.definition: Cobalamin - essential for DNA synthesis, myelination, and red blood cell formation

concepts.label: Vitamin C
concepts.definition: Ascorbic acid - water-soluble antioxidant, essential for collagen synthesis and immune function

concepts.label: Vitamin D
concepts.definition: Fat-soluble secosteroid hormone regulating calcium absorption and bone mineralization

concepts.label: Vitamin E
concepts.definition: Fat-soluble antioxidant (tocopherol) protecting cell membranes from oxidative damage

concepts.label: Vitamin K
concepts.definition: Fat-soluble vitamin essential for blood clotting factors and bone metabolism

concepts.label: Vitamin
concepts.definition: Essential organic micronutrient required in small amounts for normal metabolism

concepts.label: Night Blindness
concepts.definition: Disease caused by deficiency of Vitamin A

concepts.label: Xerophthalmia
concepts.definition: Condition associated with Vitamin A deficiency

concepts.label: Beriberi
concepts.definition: Disease caused by deficiency of Vitamin B1

concepts.label: Wernicke-Korsakoff Syndrome
concepts.definition: Condition associated with Vitamin B1 deficiency

concepts.label: Ariboflavinosis
concepts.definition: Disease caused by deficiency of Vitamin B2

concepts.label: Pellagra
concepts.definition: Disease caused by deficiency of Vitamin B3

concepts.label: Peripheral Neuropathy
concepts.definition: Disease caused by deficiency of Vitamin B6

concepts.label: Megaloblastic Anemia
concepts.definition: Disease caused by deficiency of Vitamin B9

concepts.label: Neural Tube Defects
concepts.definition: Condition associated with Vitamin B9 deficiency

concepts.label: Pernicious Anemia
concepts.definition: Disease caused by deficiency of Vitamin B12

concepts.label: Subacute Combined Degeneration
concepts.definition: Condition associated with Vitamin B12 deficiency

concepts.label: Scurvy
concepts.definition: Disease caused by deficiency of Vitamin C

concepts.label: Rickets
concepts.definition: Disease caused by deficiency of Vitamin D

concepts.label: Osteomalacia
concepts.definition: Condition associated with Vitamin D deficiency

concepts.label: Hemorrhagic Disease
concepts.definition: Disease caused by deficiency of Vitamin K

concepts.label: GnRH
concepts.definition: Gonadotropin-releasing hormone from hypothalamus stimulating FSH and LH release

concepts.label: TRH
concepts.definition: Thyrotropin-releasing hormone stimulating TSH and prolactin from anterior pituitary

concepts.label: CRH
concepts.definition: Corticotropin-releasing hormone triggering ACTH secretion from anterior pituitary

concepts.label: GHRH
concepts.definition: Growth hormone-releasing hormone stimulating GH from anterior pituitary

concepts.label: Somatostatin
concepts.definition: Inhibitory hormone suppressing GH, TSH, insulin, and glucagon release

concepts.label: Dopamine (Hormone)
concepts.definition: Prolactin-inhibiting factor from hypothalamus

concepts.label: Growth Hormone
concepts.definition: Somatotropin - stimulates growth, cell reproduction, and IGF-1 release

concepts.label: TSH
concepts.definition: Thyroid-stimulating hormone - stimulates thyroid hormone production

concepts.label: ACTH
concepts.definition: Adrenocorticotropic hormone - stimulates cortisol release from adrenal cortex

concepts.label: FSH
concepts.definition: Follicle-stimulating hormone - stimulates ovarian follicle growth and spermatogenesis

concepts.label: LH
concepts.definition: Luteinizing hormone - triggers ovulation and testosterone production

concepts.label: Prolactin
concepts.definition: Hormone stimulating milk production in mammary glands

concepts.label: Oxytocin
concepts.definition: Hormone mediating uterine contractions, milk ejection, and social bonding

concepts.label: ADH
concepts.definition: Antidiuretic hormone (vasopressin) - promotes water reabsorption in kidneys

concepts.label: T3
concepts.definition: Triiodothyronine - active thyroid hormone regulating metabolism

concepts.label: T4
concepts.definition: Thyroxine - prohormone converted to active T3, main thyroid secretion

concepts.label: Calcitonin
concepts.definition: Thyroid C-cell hormone decreasing blood calcium by inhibiting osteoclasts

concepts.label: PTH
concepts.definition: Parathyroid hormone - increases blood calcium via bone resorption and kidney reabsorption

concepts.label: Cortisol
concepts.definition: Primary glucocorticoid - anti-inflammatory, gluconeogenesis, stress response

concepts.label: Aldosterone
concepts.definition: Primary mineralocorticoid - sodium retention, potassium excretion in kidneys

concepts.label: DHEA
concepts.definition: Dehydroepiandrosterone - adrenal androgen precursor to sex hormones

concepts.label: Epinephrine
concepts.definition: Adrenaline - catecholamine mediating fight-or-flight response

concepts.label: Norepinephrine (Hormone)
concepts.definition: Catecholamine from adrenal medulla increasing blood pressure and heart rate

concepts.label: Insulin
concepts.definition: Peptide hormone from beta cells lowering blood glucose and promoting storage

concepts.label: Glucagon
concepts.definition: Peptide hormone from alpha cells raising blood glucose via glycogenolysis

concepts.label: Somatostatin (Pancreatic)
concepts.definition: Delta cell hormone inhibiting insulin and glucagon release locally

concepts.label: Pancreatic Polypeptide
concepts.definition: F-cell hormone regulating pancreatic and gastrointestinal function

concepts.label: Testosterone
concepts.definition: Primary male androgen - spermatogenesis, secondary sex characteristics, muscle mass

concepts.label: Estrogen
concepts.definition: Primary female sex hormone (estradiol) - menstrual cycle, bone density, lipid metabolism

concepts.label: Progesterone
concepts.definition: Steroid hormone maintaining pregnancy and regulating menstrual cycle

concepts.label: Inhibin
concepts.definition: Gonadal hormone providing negative feedback on FSH secretion

concepts.label: AMH
concepts.definition: Anti-Mullerian hormone - marker of ovarian reserve and sex differentiation

concepts.label: Gastrin
concepts.definition: GI hormone stimulating gastric acid secretion from parietal cells

concepts.label: Secretin
concepts.definition: Duodenal hormone stimulating bicarbonate secretion from pancreas

concepts.label: CCK
concepts.definition: Cholecystokinin - stimulates gallbladder contraction and pancreatic enzyme release

concepts.label: GIP
concepts.definition: Glucose-dependent insulinotropic peptide - incretin enhancing insulin release

concepts.label: GLP-1
concepts.definition: Glucagon-like peptide-1 - incretin hormone enhancing insulin, reducing appetite

concepts.label: Motilin
concepts.definition: GI hormone regulating migrating motor complex and gastric motility

concepts.label: Ghrelin
concepts.definition: Hunger hormone from stomach stimulating appetite and GH release

concepts.label: Leptin
concepts.definition: Adipose hormone signaling satiety and regulating energy balance

concepts.label: Adiponectin
concepts.definition: Adipokine enhancing insulin sensitivity and having anti-inflammatory effects

concepts.label: Erythropoietin
concepts.definition: Kidney hormone stimulating red blood cell production in bone marrow

concepts.label: Renin
concepts.definition: Kidney enzyme-hormone initiating the renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system

concepts.label: Calcitriol
concepts.definition: Active form of vitamin D (1,25-dihydroxyvitamin D3) produced in kidney

concepts.label: ANP
concepts.definition: Atrial natriuretic peptide - reduces blood pressure by promoting sodium excretion

concepts.label: BNP
concepts.definition: Brain natriuretic peptide - marker of heart failure, promotes natriuresis

concepts.label: Melatonin
concepts.definition: Pineal hormone regulating circadian rhythm and sleep-wake cycle

concepts.label: Thymosin
concepts.definition: Thymic hormone promoting T-cell maturation and differentiation

concepts.label: hCG
concepts.definition: Human chorionic gonadotropin - maintains corpus luteum in early pregnancy

concepts.label: Human Placental Lactogen
concepts.definition: Placental hormone modifying maternal metabolism for fetal nutrition

concepts.label: Angiotensin II
concepts.definition: Potent vasoconstrictor peptide hormone in RAAS, stimulates aldosterone

concepts.label: Thrombopoietin
concepts.definition: Liver/kidney hormone stimulating platelet production by megakaryocytes

concepts.label: Hepcidin
concepts.definition: Liver hormone regulating iron absorption and release from macrophages

concepts.label: IGF-1
concepts.definition: Insulin-like growth factor 1 - mediates growth hormone effects on tissues

concepts.label: Hormone
concepts.definition: Chemical messenger produced by endocrine glands transported via blood to target organs

concepts.label: Blood Glucose
concepts.definition: Concentration of glucose in the bloodstream, normally 70-100 mg/dL fasting

concepts.label: Blood Calcium
concepts.definition: Serum calcium level normally 8.5-10.5 mg/dL, regulated by PTH, calcitonin, vitamin D

concepts.label: Blood Pressure
concepts.definition: Force of blood against arterial walls, normal ~120/80 mmHg

concepts.label: Appetite
concepts.definition: Desire to eat, regulated by hypothalamic centers and hormonal signals

concepts.label: Red Blood Cell Production
concepts.definition: Erythropoiesis - production of RBCs in bone marrow

concepts.label: Acetylcholine
concepts.definition: Neurotransmitter at neuromuscular junctions and parasympathetic synapses

concepts.label: Dopamine
concepts.definition: Catecholamine neurotransmitter in reward, motivation, motor control

concepts.label: Norepinephrine
concepts.definition: Catecholamine neurotransmitter in alertness, attention, fight-or-flight

concepts.label: Serotonin
concepts.definition: 5-HT - monoamine neurotransmitter regulating mood, sleep, appetite

concepts.label: GABA
concepts.definition: Gamma-aminobutyric acid - primary inhibitory neurotransmitter in the CNS

concepts.label: Glutamate (NT)
concepts.definition: Primary excitatory neurotransmitter in the CNS via NMDA and AMPA receptors

concepts.label: Glycine (NT)
concepts.definition: Inhibitory neurotransmitter in spinal cord and brainstem

concepts.label: Histamine (NT)
concepts.definition: Neurotransmitter from tuberomammillary nucleus regulating wakefulness

concepts.label: Endorphins
concepts.definition: Endogenous opioid peptides providing pain relief and euphoria

concepts.label: Enkephalins
concepts.definition: Pentapeptide endogenous opioids modulating pain in spinal cord

concepts.label: Dynorphins
concepts.definition: Endogenous opioid peptides acting on kappa receptors

concepts.label: Substance P
concepts.definition: Neuropeptide transmitting pain signals and inflammation

concepts.label: Nitric Oxide
concepts.definition: Gaseous neurotransmitter causing vasodilation and retrograde signaling

concepts.label: Anandamide
concepts.definition: Endocannabinoid neurotransmitter acting on CB1 receptors

concepts.label: 2-AG
concepts.definition: 2-Arachidonoylglycerol - most abundant endocannabinoid in the brain

concepts.label: ATP (NT)
concepts.definition: Purinergic neurotransmitter acting on P2X and P2Y receptors

concepts.label: Adenosine
concepts.definition: Purinergic neuromodulator promoting sleep and inhibiting arousal

concepts.label: Neuropeptide Y
concepts.definition: Peptide neurotransmitter stimulating appetite and reducing anxiety

concepts.label: Oxytocin (NT)
concepts.definition: Neuropeptide mediating social bonding, trust, and empathy in CNS

concepts.label: Vasopressin (NT)
concepts.definition: Neuropeptide involved in social behavior, stress, and pair bonding

concepts.label: CGRP
concepts.definition: Calcitonin gene-related peptide - vasodilator involved in migraine pathophysiology

concepts.label: VIP
concepts.definition: Vasoactive intestinal peptide - neurotransmitter in gut and circadian regulation

concepts.label: Orexin
concepts.definition: Hypothalamic neuropeptide regulating wakefulness and appetite

concepts.label: Agmatine
concepts.definition: Decarboxylated arginine acting as neuromodulator at imidazoline receptors

concepts.label: Neurotransmitter
concepts.definition: Chemical messenger transmitting signals across synapses between neurons

concepts.label: Reward System
concepts.definition: Mesolimbic dopamine pathway mediating pleasure and reinforcement

concepts.label: Mood Regulation
concepts.definition: Complex neural process involving serotonin, norepinephrine, and dopamine

concepts.label: Wakefulness
concepts.definition: State of consciousness maintained by ascending reticular activating system

concepts.label: Pain
concepts.definition: Unpleasant sensory experience associated with tissue damage or threat

concepts.label: Muscle Contraction
concepts.definition: Sliding filament mechanism of actin-myosin interaction generating force

concepts.label: Neutrophil
concepts.definition: Most abundant WBC, first responder in bacterial infections via phagocytosis

concepts.label: Eosinophil
concepts.definition: WBC targeting parasites and involved in allergic responses

concepts.label: Basophil
concepts.definition: Rarest granulocyte releasing histamine and heparin in allergic reactions

concepts.label: Monocyte
concepts.definition: Large WBC that differentiates into macrophages and dendritic cells in tissues

concepts.label: Lymphocyte
concepts.definition: Adaptive immune cells including T cells, B cells, and NK cells

concepts.label: Erythrocyte
concepts.definition: Red blood cell - biconcave disc carrying oxygen via hemoglobin

concepts.label: Thrombocyte
concepts.definition: Platelet - cell fragment from megakaryocytes essential for blood clotting

concepts.label: Reticulocyte
concepts.definition: Immature red blood cell with residual RNA, marker of erythropoiesis

concepts.label: CD4+ T Cell
concepts.definition: Helper T cell coordinating immune response via cytokine release

concepts.label: CD8+ T Cell
concepts.definition: Cytotoxic T cell killing virus-infected and tumor cells via perforin/granzyme

concepts.label: Regulatory T Cell
concepts.definition: Treg cell suppressing immune responses maintaining self-tolerance

concepts.label: B Cell
concepts.definition: Lymphocyte producing antibodies after antigen activation

concepts.label: Plasma Cell
concepts.definition: Terminally differentiated B cell secreting large amounts of antibodies

concepts.label: Memory B Cell
concepts.definition: Long-lived B cell providing rapid secondary immune response

concepts.label: Natural Killer Cell
concepts.definition: Innate lymphocyte killing virus-infected and tumor cells without prior sensitization

concepts.label: Macrophage
concepts.definition: Tissue-resident phagocyte derived from monocytes, antigen presentation

concepts.label: Dendritic Cell
concepts.definition: Professional antigen-presenting cell bridging innate and adaptive immunity

concepts.label: Mast Cell
concepts.definition: Tissue-resident cell releasing histamine and mediators in allergic responses

concepts.label: Kupffer Cell
concepts.definition: Liver-resident macrophage clearing pathogens from portal blood

concepts.label: Microglia
concepts.definition: CNS-resident macrophage providing immune surveillance in the brain

concepts.label: Langerhans Cell
concepts.definition: Dendritic cell in epidermis capturing and presenting skin antigens

concepts.label: Squamous Epithelial Cell
concepts.definition: Flat thin cell lining surfaces like skin, blood vessels, alveoli

concepts.label: Columnar Epithelial Cell
concepts.definition: Tall cell lining gut and respiratory tract, often with microvilli or cilia

concepts.label: Cuboidal Epithelial Cell
concepts.definition: Cube-shaped cell in kidney tubules, thyroid follicles, and ducts

concepts.label: Goblet Cell
concepts.definition: Mucus-secreting epithelial cell in respiratory and GI tract

concepts.label: Ciliated Epithelial Cell
concepts.definition: Cell with motile cilia moving mucus in airways and fallopian tubes

concepts.label: Enterocyte
concepts.definition: Absorptive intestinal epithelial cell with brush border microvilli

concepts.label: Paneth Cell
concepts.definition: Small intestine crypt cell secreting antimicrobial defensins and lysozyme

concepts.label: Clara Cell
concepts.definition: Club cell in bronchioles secreting surfactant protein and detoxifying inhaled substances

concepts.label: Type I Pneumocyte
concepts.definition: Thin alveolar cell forming gas exchange surface (95% of alveolar area)

concepts.label: Type II Pneumocyte
concepts.definition: Alveolar cell producing surfactant and regenerating type I cells

concepts.label: Podocyte
concepts.definition: Specialized kidney glomerular cell forming filtration slits

concepts.label: Mesangial Cell
concepts.definition: Glomerular support cell regulating filtration and producing extracellular matrix

concepts.label: Fibroblast
concepts.definition: Primary connective tissue cell producing collagen and extracellular matrix

concepts.label: Chondrocyte
concepts.definition: Cartilage cell maintaining extracellular matrix in lacunae

concepts.label: Osteoblast
concepts.definition: Bone-forming cell synthesizing and mineralizing osteoid

concepts.label: Osteoclast
concepts.definition: Multinucleated bone-resorbing cell derived from monocyte-macrophage lineage

concepts.label: Osteocyte
concepts.definition: Mature bone cell embedded in lacunae sensing mechanical stress

concepts.label: Adipocyte
concepts.definition: Fat cell storing triglycerides and secreting adipokines

concepts.label: Chondroblast
concepts.definition: Immature cartilage cell actively producing cartilage matrix

concepts.label: Skeletal Muscle Cell
concepts.definition: Multinucleated striated voluntary muscle fiber

concepts.label: Cardiac Muscle Cell
concepts.definition: Striated involuntary cardiomyocyte with intercalated discs

concepts.label: Smooth Muscle Cell
concepts.definition: Non-striated involuntary muscle in blood vessels and viscera

concepts.label: Satellite Cell
concepts.definition: Skeletal muscle stem cell enabling regeneration after injury

concepts.label: Motor Neuron
concepts.definition: Efferent neuron transmitting signals from CNS to muscles

concepts.label: Sensory Neuron
concepts.definition: Afferent neuron transmitting sensory information to CNS

concepts.label: Interneuron
concepts.definition: CNS neuron connecting sensory and motor pathways

concepts.label: Pyramidal Neuron
concepts.definition: Large excitatory cortical neuron with pyramid-shaped soma

concepts.label: Purkinje Cell
concepts.definition: Large cerebellar neuron with elaborate dendritic tree, inhibitory output

concepts.label: Dopaminergic Neuron
concepts.definition: Neuron producing dopamine, concentrated in substantia nigra and VTA

concepts.label: Astrocyte
concepts.definition: Star-shaped glial cell supporting neurons, forming blood-brain barrier

concepts.label: Oligodendrocyte
concepts.definition: CNS glial cell producing myelin sheath around axons

concepts.label: Schwann Cell
concepts.definition: PNS glial cell myelinating peripheral nerve axons

concepts.label: Ependymal Cell
concepts.definition: Ciliated cell lining brain ventricles producing and circulating CSF

concepts.label: Beta Cell
concepts.definition: Pancreatic islet cell producing insulin in response to glucose

concepts.label: Alpha Cell
concepts.definition: Pancreatic islet cell producing glucagon

concepts.label: Delta Cell
concepts.definition: Pancreatic islet cell producing somatostatin

concepts.label: Thyroid Follicular Cell
concepts.definition: Thyrocyte producing T3 and T4 thyroid hormones

concepts.label: C Cell
concepts.definition: Parafollicular thyroid cell producing calcitonin

concepts.label: Chromaffin Cell
concepts.definition: Adrenal medulla cell secreting epinephrine and norepinephrine

concepts.label: Zona Glomerulosa Cell
concepts.definition: Adrenal cortex cell producing aldosterone

concepts.label: Zona Fasciculata Cell
concepts.definition: Adrenal cortex cell producing cortisol

concepts.label: Somatotroph
concepts.definition: Anterior pituitary cell producing growth hormone

concepts.label: Lactotroph
concepts.definition: Anterior pituitary cell producing prolactin

concepts.label: Thyrotroph
concepts.definition: Anterior pituitary cell producing TSH

concepts.label: Corticotroph
concepts.definition: Anterior pituitary cell producing ACTH

concepts.label: Gonadotroph
concepts.definition: Anterior pituitary cell producing FSH and LH

concepts.label: Pinealocyte
concepts.definition: Pineal gland cell producing melatonin

concepts.label: Parietal Cell
concepts.definition: Gastric cell secreting hydrochloric acid and intrinsic factor

concepts.label: Chief Cell
concepts.definition: Gastric cell secreting pepsinogen and gastric lipase

concepts.label: G Cell
concepts.definition: Gastric antral cell secreting gastrin

concepts.label: S Cell
concepts.definition: Duodenal cell secreting secretin

concepts.label: I Cell
concepts.definition: Duodenal cell secreting cholecystokinin (CCK)

concepts.label: K Cell
concepts.definition: Duodenal cell secreting GIP (glucose-dependent insulinotropic peptide)

concepts.label: L Cell
concepts.definition: Intestinal cell secreting GLP-1 and PYY

concepts.label: Hepatocyte
concepts.definition: Liver parenchymal cell performing metabolism, detoxification, bile production

concepts.label: Cholangiocyte
concepts.definition: Bile duct epithelial cell modifying bile composition

concepts.label: Stellate Cell
concepts.definition: Hepatic fat-storing cell that becomes fibrogenic in liver injury

concepts.label: Spermatogonium
concepts.definition: Male germ stem cell in seminiferous tubules

concepts.label: Spermatocyte
concepts.definition: Male germ cell undergoing meiosis during spermatogenesis

concepts.label: Spermatid
concepts.definition: Haploid male germ cell differentiating into spermatozoon

concepts.label: Sertoli Cell
concepts.definition: Testicular nurse cell supporting spermatogenesis and forming blood-testis barrier

concepts.label: Leydig Cell
concepts.definition: Testicular interstitial cell producing testosterone

concepts.label: Oocyte
concepts.definition: Female germ cell that develops into ovum

concepts.label: Granulosa Cell
concepts.definition: Ovarian follicular cell producing estrogen and supporting oocyte

concepts.label: Theca Cell
concepts.definition: Ovarian cell producing androgens converted to estrogen by granulosa cells

concepts.label: Trophoblast
concepts.definition: Outer cell layer of blastocyst forming placenta

concepts.label: Keratinocyte
concepts.definition: Primary epidermal cell producing keratin for skin barrier

concepts.label: Melanocyte
concepts.definition: Pigment-producing cell in epidermis synthesizing melanin

concepts.label: Merkel Cell
concepts.definition: Tactile mechanoreceptor cell in epidermis for light touch

concepts.label: Hematopoietic Stem Cell
concepts.definition: Multipotent bone marrow stem cell giving rise to all blood cell lineages

concepts.label: Mesenchymal Stem Cell
concepts.definition: Multipotent stromal cell differentiating into bone, cartilage, fat

concepts.label: Neural Stem Cell
concepts.definition: Multipotent CNS cell generating neurons and glia

concepts.label: Embryonic Stem Cell
concepts.definition: Pluripotent cell from inner cell mass capable of forming any cell type

concepts.label: iPSC
concepts.definition: Induced pluripotent stem cell - adult cell reprogrammed to embryonic-like state

concepts.label: Megakaryocyte
concepts.definition: Large bone marrow cell producing platelets via cytoplasmic fragmentation

concepts.label: Red Pulp Macrophage
concepts.definition: Splenic macrophage removing old or damaged red blood cells

concepts.label: Myofibroblast
concepts.definition: Activated fibroblast with contractile properties in wound healing and fibrosis

concepts.label: Tenocyte
concepts.definition: Tendon cell maintaining collagen fibers in tendons

concepts.label: Pericyte
concepts.definition: Perivascular cell wrapping capillaries regulating blood flow and vessel stability

concepts.label: Juxtaglomerular Cell
concepts.definition: Modified smooth muscle cell in kidney producing renin

concepts.label: Macula Densa Cell
concepts.definition: Kidney tubular cell sensing NaCl concentration for tubuloglomerular feedback

concepts.label: Hair Cell
concepts.definition: Mechanoreceptor in inner ear converting sound/motion to neural signals

concepts.label: Rod Cell
concepts.definition: Retinal photoreceptor for dim light (scotopic) vision

concepts.label: Cone Cell
concepts.definition: Retinal photoreceptor for color (photopic) vision

concepts.label: Cell Type
concepts.definition: Distinct morphological or functional category of cell in the body

concepts.label: Bone Formation
concepts.definition: Osteogenesis - process of new bone tissue creation by osteoblasts

concepts.label: Bone Resorption
concepts.definition: Breakdown of bone tissue by osteoclasts releasing calcium

concepts.label: Myelin Synthesis
concepts.definition: Formation of myelin sheath around axons for saltatory conduction

concepts.label: Hydrochloric Acid
concepts.definition: Gastric acid (pH 1-2) from parietal cells for digestion and pathogen killing

concepts.label: Amylase
concepts.definition: Enzyme hydrolyzing starch into maltose, found in saliva and pancreas

concepts.label: Pepsin
concepts.definition: Gastric protease active at pH 1-2, cleaving proteins into peptides

concepts.label: Trypsin
concepts.definition: Pancreatic serine protease cleaving peptide bonds after lysine/arginine

concepts.label: Chymotrypsin
concepts.definition: Pancreatic protease cleaving after aromatic amino acids

concepts.label: Lipase
concepts.definition: Enzyme hydrolyzing triglycerides into fatty acids and glycerol

concepts.label: Lactase
concepts.definition: Brush border enzyme hydrolyzing lactose into glucose and galactose

concepts.label: Sucrase
concepts.definition: Brush border enzyme hydrolyzing sucrose into glucose and fructose

concepts.label: Maltase
concepts.definition: Brush border enzyme hydrolyzing maltose into glucose

concepts.label: Pepsinogen
concepts.definition: Inactive zymogen of pepsin activated by HCl in stomach

concepts.label: Trypsinogen
concepts.definition: Inactive precursor of trypsin activated by enterokinase

concepts.label: Enterokinase
concepts.definition: Duodenal enzyme activating trypsinogen to trypsin

concepts.label: Elastase
concepts.definition: Pancreatic enzyme digesting elastin; fecal elastase tests pancreatic function

concepts.label: Carboxypeptidase
concepts.definition: Pancreatic exopeptidase removing C-terminal amino acids

concepts.label: Hexokinase
concepts.definition: First enzyme of glycolysis phosphorylating glucose to glucose-6-phosphate

concepts.label: Glucokinase
concepts.definition: Liver/beta cell hexokinase isoform with high Km serving as glucose sensor

concepts.label: Phosphofructokinase-1
concepts.definition: Rate-limiting enzyme of glycolysis phosphorylating fructose-6-phosphate

concepts.label: Pyruvate Kinase
concepts.definition: Final glycolytic enzyme converting PEP to pyruvate with ATP generation

concepts.label: Lactate Dehydrogenase
concepts.definition: Enzyme converting pyruvate to lactate in anaerobic conditions; tissue damage marker

concepts.label: Pyruvate Dehydrogenase
concepts.definition: Mitochondrial complex converting pyruvate to acetyl-CoA linking glycolysis to TCA

concepts.label: Citrate Synthase
concepts.definition: First TCA cycle enzyme condensing acetyl-CoA with oxaloacetate to citrate

concepts.label: Isocitrate Dehydrogenase
concepts.definition: TCA cycle enzyme oxidizing isocitrate to alpha-ketoglutarate

concepts.label: Alpha-Ketoglutarate Dehydrogenase
concepts.definition: TCA cycle enzyme complex producing succinyl-CoA

concepts.label: Succinate Dehydrogenase
concepts.definition: Complex II of ETC, also TCA enzyme oxidizing succinate to fumarate
